The Black Hive of Doom

Level 1

General
Dungeon Walls Hewn Stone (Climb DC 25)
Dungeon Floor Flagstone
Temperature Cool
Illumination Bright (lamps or torches every 40 ft.)
Corridors
a The scent of smoke fills the corridor
c Skeletons hang from chains and manacles against the walls
e A tile labyrinth covers the floor
i An unidentifiable odor fills the corridor
m Ghoul Touch Trap: CR 3; magic device; touch trigger; automatic reset; spell effect (Ghoul Touch, 3rd level wizard, DC 13 Fort save negates); Search DC 27; Disable Device DC 27
n Part of the ceiling has collapsed into the corridor
r A splashing noise fills the corridor
s Deeper Pit Trap: CR 1; mechanical; location trigger; manual reset; hidden switch bypass (Search DC 25); DC 15 Reflex save avoids; 20 ft. deep (2d6, fall); multiple targets (first target in each of two adjacent 5 ft. squares); Search DC 20; Disable Device DC 23
u The walls here have been engraved with geometric patterns
v A clanking sound fills the corridor
w Several square holes are cut into the walls here
x Ceiling Pendulum: CR 3; mechanical; timed trigger; automatic reset; Atk +15 melee (1d12+8/x3, greataxe); Search DC 15; Disable Device DC 27
z The walls here have been engraved with incoherent labyrinths
